prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `1efba499`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 package for `1efba499`. The verifier keeps the dominant non-background color union fixed, detects whether that union is horizontally or vertically oriented, and only swaps opposite-side singleton markers onto the boundary on lines where both sides are populated. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as a starting hypothesis because it matched the official examples; no `notes.md` or new `dsl_ext` primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the built [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1efba499/task.json) contains 1000 generated pairs. I also rendered [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1efba499/previews/preview_01.png) in-terminal for a coarse visual sanity check; the samples looked consistent with the task family.
